reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the birth years for Robert Z. Leonard and Sinclair Hill.

original_final_question: Which film director is younger, Robert Z. Leonard or Sinclair Hill? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Robert Z. Leonard was born on October 7, 1889, while Sinclair Hill was born in 1894, so Sinclair Hill is younger. -> Sinclair Hill
